# Morning Digest - Thursday, June 11, 2026

## Emails Needing Attention
Microsoft Outlook connector unavailable. Email data could not be retrieved this run. Please check inbox manually or reconnect Outlook in Cowork settings.

## Teams - Active Conversations
Microsoft Teams connector unavailable. Chat data could not be retrieved this run.

## Todays Agenda
Microsoft Calendar connector unavailable. Calendar data could not be retrieved this run.

## Immediate Action
Microsoft connectors (Outlook + Teams) unreachable during automated run. Reconnect the Microsoft 365 integration in Cowork Settings to restore full digest functionality.
